message:
fix(rig): use IsRigParkedOrDocked instead of wisp config for docked check (gt-7uhc)

gt rig start was checking wisp ephemeral config string for parked/docked
status, which misses persistent bead labels (the canonical source of truth
for docked state). Replace with IsRigParkedOrDocked which checks both
wisp state and bead labels.

Also add the missing parked/docked check to gt rig boot, which had no
check at all.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
